chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.S-228 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For order son office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Jawad Hussain Rajpar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maltlo, Deputy Prosecutor General ************** Through the present petition, the petitioner has approached this Court seeking protection against alleged harassment at the hands of the official respondents. The official respondents have filed their respective statements/comments, same are taken on record. They deny the allegations leveled against them and submit that they have neither caused any undue harassment to the petitioner nor intend to do so in the future. Mr. Faiz Ahmed Janwari, Advocate, has filed a vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 to 8, which is taken on record. He has also filed a statement on their behalf, which is too taken on record. Respondents No.7 and 8, namely Ali Raza and Sajjan, are present and submit that the instant petition is frivolous and misconceived, alleging that the petitioner has filed it merely to exert pressure upon them and others in order to usurp the land. In view of the statements of the official respondents, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the present petition stands disposed of. However, the official respondents are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and will act strictly in accordance with law, and to provide him legal protection under the scheme of law.

Accordingly, the present petition stands disposed of. However, the official respondents are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and will act strictly in accordance with law, and to provide him legal protection under the scheme of law. This order shall not affect any inquiry, investigation, or trial, if already pending against the petitioner before any competent forum. J U D G E M. Ali*
